    <item>
      <title>Joel Embiid calls out Sixers fans with one simple request vs. the Knicks</title>
      <description>Against all odds, the Philadelphia 76ers overcame a 3-1 series deficit in the first round to knock out the No. 2-seeded Boston Celtics. Now, Nick Nurse's team will face the New York Knicks in the second round and another edition of this rivalry between towns.</description>

      </media:content>

    </item>
    <item>
      <title>Cade Cunningham's words mean even more after Pistons' thrilling Game 7 win</title>
      <description>Cunningham and the Pistons did what's so difficult to do in the heat of the NBA playoffs. They pulled off three consecutive wins to advance.</description>

    <item>
      <title>Cade Cunningham, Tobias Harris make history in Pistons' Game 7 win over Magic</title>
      <description>The Detroit Pistons capped off their first-round series against the Orlando Magic on Sunday with a Game 7 116-94 win, advancing them to the Eastern Conference semifinals.</description>
      <pubDate>03 May 2026 19:07:03 -0400</pubDate>

    <item>
      <title>Timberwolves' Anthony Edwards may return sooner than expected for series against Spurs</title>
      <description>Minnesota Timberwolves guard Anthony Edwards is itching to return to postseason action.  Minnesota was initially expected to be without Edwards (left knee) for the first two games of its series against the San Antonio Spurs. </description>

    <item>
      <title>Nikola Jokic knows who to blame for Nuggets' epic playoff collapse</title>
      <description>The Denver Nuggets have some tough decisions to make in the offseason. Failing to take down the No. 6 seed Minnesota Timberwolves without Anthony Edwards, Donte DiVincenzo and Ayo Dosunmu might be the biggest blemish in Nikola Jokic's postseason career so far. </description>
      <pubDate>03 May 2026 23:50:36 -0400</pubDate>

    <item>
      <title>Raptors stay alive on RJ Barrett's wild game-winning three</title>
      <description>Seven years ago, Kawhi Leonard sent the Toronto Raptors to the Eastern Conference Finals with a game-winning shot that took a fortunate bounce through the hoop.</description>

    <item>
      <title>Jarrett Allen's Game 7 performance matches LeBron James in Cavaliers' history</title>
      <description>One key role player made history as the Cleveland Cavaliers punched their ticket to the second round with a 114-102 win over the Toronto Raptors on Sunday night.  While it took a total team effort for the Cavaliers to clinch their first-round series in seven games, Jarrett Allen stepped up more than anyone else. </description>
      <pubDate>03 May 2026 23:05:40 -0400</pubDate>
      <link>https://www.yardbarker.com/nba/articles/jarrett_allens_game_7_performance_matches_lebron_james_in_cavaliers_history/s1_13132_43802743</link>
      <guid>https://www.yardbarker.com/nba/articles/jarrett_allens_game_7_performance_matches_lebron_james_in_cavaliers_history/s1_13132_43802743</guid>
      <author>Mike J. Asti, Yardbarker</author>
      <media:content url="http://www.yardbarker.com/media/7/2/720aa28330a300a1f72146db5a789c118697a60e/thumb_16x9/jarrett-allens-game-7-performance-matches-lebron.jpg">
        <media:credit> Nick Turchiaro-Imagn Images </media:credit>
        <media:title> Cleveland Cavaliers center Jarrett Allen. </media:title>
      </media:content>
      <category>NBA</category>
      <category>Cleveland Cavaliers</category>
      <category>Toronto Raptors</category>
      <category>Los Angeles Lakers</category>
      <category>Jarrett Allen</category>
      <category>Donovan Mitchell</category>
      <category>James Harden</category>
      <category>LeBron James</category>
    </item>
    <item>
      <title>76ers complete historic series comeback to stun Celtics in Game 7</title>
      <description>The Philadelphia 76ers appeared to be heading toward a first-round playoff exit, facing a 3-1 series deficit to the Boston Celtics. With Saturday's 109-100 win in Game 7, they are heading to the Eastern Conference semifinals for the first time since 2023.</description>
      <pubDate>02 May 2026 22:07:53 -0400</pubDate>
      <link>https://www.yardbarker.com/nba/articles/76ers_complete_historic_series_comeback_to_stun_celtics_in_game_7/s1_13132_43799799</link>

        <media:title> Philadelphia 76ers guard Tyrese Maxey (0) drives past Boston Celtics guard Jaylen Brown (7) during the third quarter at Xfinity Mobile Arena. </media:title>
      </media:content>
      <category>NBA</category>
      <category>Philadelphia 76ers</category>
      <category>Boston Celtics</category>
      <category>New York Knicks</category>
    </item>

    <item>
      <title>Cade Cunningham's monster performance leads Pistons to second round</title>
      <description>It has been a long time coming, but the Detroit Pistons are finally back through to the second round of the NBA playoffs.</description>
      <pubDate>03 May 2026 18:22:17 -0400</pubDate>
      <link>https://www.yardbarker.com/nba/articles/cade_cunninghams_monster_performance_leads_pistons_to_second_round/s1_13132_43802205</link>

        <media:credit> Rick Osentoski-Imagn Images </media:credit>
        <media:title> Detroit Pistons guard Cade Cunningham (2) dribbles, defended by Orlando Magic forward Moritz Wagner (21) in the second half during Game 7 of the first round of the 2026 NBA Playoffs at Little Caesars Arena. </media:title>
      </media:content>
